mapper.select: SELECT FID, FBillNo,F_hyf, FBillAllAmount, FBillAllAmount_LC, F_bxf, F_gwyhfy, F_qtwbfy, F_mxcbhj, F_mxtshj, F_cbxj, F_bzf, F_dlf, F_rzf, F_kdf, F_hdf, F_lyf, F_qtfy, F_mjf, F_jcf, F_fyxj, F_lrl, F_wbyk, F_jlrl, F_jlre FROM t_sale_order_cost WHERE FID = #{fid}

SELECT FID, FBillNo,F_hyf, FBillAllAmount, FBillAllAmount_LC, F_bxf, F_gwyhfy, F_qtwbfy, F_mxcbhj, F_mxtshj, F_cbxj, F_bzf, F_dlf, F_rzf, F_kdf, F_hdf, F_lyf, F_qtfy, F_mjf, F_jcf, F_fyxj, F_lrl, F_wbyk, F_jlrl, F_jlre FROM t_sale_order_cost WHERE FBillNo = #{fbillNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_sale_order_cost ( FID,FBillNo, F_hyf, FBillAllAmount, FBillAllAmount_LC, F_bxf, F_gwyhfy, F_qtwbfy, F_mxcbhj, F_mxtshj, F_cbxj, F_bzf, F_dlf, F_rzf, F_kdf, F_hdf, F_lyf, F_qtfy, F_mjf, F_jcf, F_fyxj, F_lrl, F_wbyk, F_jlrl, F_jlre ) VALUES ( #{fid},#{fbillno}, #{fHyf}, #{fBillAllAmount}, #{fBillAllAmountLc}, #{fBxf}, #{fGwyhfy}, #{fQtwbfy}, #{fMxcbhj}, #{fMxtshj}, #{fCbxj}, #{fBzf}, #{fDlf}, #{fRzf}, #{fKdf}, #{fHdf}, #{fLyf}, #{fQtfy}, #{fMjf}, #{fJcf}, #{fFyxj}, #{fLrl}, #{fWbyk}, #{fJlrl}, #{fJlre} )

INSERT INTO t_sale_order_cost ( FID,FBillNo, F_hyf, FBillAllAmount, FBillAllAmount_LC, F_bxf, F_gwyhfy, F_qtwbfy, F_mxcbhj, F_mxtshj, F_cbxj, F_bzf, F_dlf, F_rzf, F_kdf, F_hdf, F_lyf, F_qtfy, F_mjf, F_jcf, F_fyxj, F_lrl, F_wbyk, F_jlrl, F_jlre ) VALUES
( #{item.fid},#{item.fbillno}, #{item.fHyf}, #{item.fBillAllAmount}, #{item.fBillAllAmountLc}, #{item.fBxf}, #{item.fGwyhfy}, #{item.fQtwbfy}, #{item.fMxcbhj}, #{item.fMxtshj}, #{item.fCbxj}, #{item.fBzf}, #{item.fDlf}, #{item.fRzf}, #{item.fKdf}, #{item.fHdf}, #{item.fLyf}, #{item.fQtfy}, #{item.fMjf}, #{item.fJcf}, #{item.fFyxj}, #{item.fLrl}, #{item.fWbyk}, #{item.fJlrl}, #{item.fJlre} )
